name: IdsBalIncomeRunCycUpd

text.value:
WITH cte AS (
SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO 
FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC 
WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' 
  AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' 
  AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' 
  AND ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' 
  AND CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N' 
  AND RI_BAL_IN = 'N' 
  AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} 
GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD
)
UPDATE T 
  SET T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'Y',
      T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'Y' 
FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T 
JOIN cte 
  ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD 
    AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD 
    AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD 
WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO 
  AND T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' 
  AND T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N'

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:    IdsIncomeBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job Updates the P_RUN_CYC table with the ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN set to 'Y' after balancing is done for the subject area

Annotations:
Job Name: IdsBalIncomeRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Income with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Copy Stage for buffer
Update the P_RUN_CYC table with Balancing Indicators set to 'Y' to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
Balancing Income Row To Row and Column Sum Update for P_RUN_CYC table
